name: VOID SOUL
detailed_description:
"Alright, we're going to rush to our target destination."
Fusion Steampunk Style Novel Adventure Game 「Void Soul」

⚙️ The Story of a desert empire and a rebel train that rises against it
⚙️ Dot graphic adventure exploring, diverse puzzles and countless events
⚙️ Over 17 hours of epic steampunk storytelling!

Dive into an explosive tale fueled by endless revenge and a twisted longing for family—where two burning emotions ignite a journey to the very end!

The full-featured PC Complete Edition of Void Soul is here!

⚙️ Experience the True Ending of the story after progressing through 14 chapters
⚙️ What if you had made a different choice…? Discover 4 Bad Endings that change based on your decisions
⚙️ The first encounter between Cadet Cassius and the boy Klaproth, featuring an exclusive extra story available only in the Complete Edition

❗ The limited extra story and Bad Endings unlock from your second playthrough

⚙️ Charming characters and stories such as Chief Commander of rebel train or Emperor longing for revenge
  - Story full of love and revenge, laughter and touching, solemnness and madness!

⚙️Dot graphic adventure exploring fortress in desert, train, palace and more
  - Manipulate character to explore various fields by yourself!

⚙️Luxurious voice actors and your liking standing images & illustrations
  - Play delighting your eyes and ears! Enjoy the crucial moment for 200%!

⚙️Battle that has various puzzles & simple but suspenseful
  - Be the one with character and get over the odds!

⚙️Character introduction

✨ TESLA
The head of rebels confronting the empire and chief commander of infinite-energy train Tesla Leads rebels only to revenge the empire that destroyed hometown

✨ COIL
Captain of Tesla's rebels
He is an ace with the best combat capability but deeply rely to Tesla mentally

✨ DESTY
Army Surgeon of Tesla's rebels
Mysterious mad doctor. He had a crush on Tesla's eyes at first sight.

✨ KLAPROTH
Emperor who does everything whatever it takes to achieve goal
He seems to be obsessed with Tesla
